artifact.refreeze_note: Round 4 (CONSOLIDATION, current). Supersedes 9ca4d07ca403b6c2 (round 3), which a final 6-lens adversarial review found had gone STALE vs main: r3 was built at 74bdb37c, BEFORE PR #805 corrected shipped NEWS.md + vignettes/cross-family.Rmd, so it still carried the v0.5.0-as-milestone defects main had already fixed. This artifact is rebuilt from current main and VERIFIED to contain those fixes (old NEWS 'first CRAN release' claim absent; old cross-family 'ships in 0.5.0' absent; superseded historical note present). Note R CMD build is not bit-reproducible (built vignettes carry timestamps), so each rebuild yields a new hash and this artifact carries its OWN check/smoke logs. src/ remains byte-identical to round-1 source 091d0a13, so the local-UBSAN result still carries forward. CRAN-lane PASS 12011 reproduced identically across all four rounds. Earlier rounds: e818e1651dc188f9 (r2), afd4600a86830451 (r1) — all carry SUPERSEDED.txt.

platform_matrix.value: NOT reached at the tarball-clean rung: the REMOTE platform matrix (win-builder R-release/R-devel; R-hub UBSAN/valgrind/rchk; 3-OS GH matrix) is the declared NEXT gate, out of this lane. A LOCAL clang-UBSAN probe WAS run (see compiled_diagnostics).

external_logs.value: NOT_APPLICABLE at tarball-clean: no win-builder/R-hub submitted (next gate).

size_and_vignette_budget.value: Installed size 27.8Mb (libs 13.4Mb compiled TMB, doc 9.4Mb, sim 1.7Mb) -> expected size INFO/NOTE on CRAN machines, explained in cran-comments.md (intrinsic to TMB, cf. glmmTMB). Vignettes re-built locally in 78s; Windows timing to be confirmed at the platform-matrix gate.

reverse_dependencies.value: NOT_APPLICABLE: first submission, no reverse dependencies.

external_service_behaviour.value: JuliaCall is Suggests-only, powering an optional engine='julia' back end; all invoking tests use skip_if_not_installed() and additionally require a local dev checkout of the not-yet-registered Julia package, so they skip on CRAN. Default/only required engine is the bundled TMB code.

panel_round1.verdict: 3x NOT-READY -> tarball-clean rung WITHHELD (2026-07-20) on artifact afd4600a86830451; all three findings were release-surface honesty defects, none a package/C++ regression.
panel_round1.grace: NOT-READY — hash/size/inventory/--as-cran-lane/UBSAN all clean, but install-smoke.log ended SMOKE_EXIT=1 (ad-hoc round(coef(fit)[1],3); coef.drmTMB returns a named list). Evidence-vs-claim gap.
panel_round1.rose: NOT-READY — (1) handover 'Install smoke PASSED' cited a crashed log; (2) ROADMAP.md still recommended v0.5.0 + showed 0.6.0.9000. Manifest capability ceiling NOT exceeded.
panel_round1.pat: NOT-READY — (1) same install-smoke gap; (2) cross-family.Rmd:288 over-promised fitted()/predict() for the xfam route vs capability-and-limits.Rmd:398-406 (they return NULL). Other three limitations honest.
panel_round1.resolution: All three fixed in commit 00ec3914; re-frozen as e818e1651dc188f9; panel re-run (round 2).

panel_round2.verdict: 2 READY (Grace, Rose) + 1 NOT-READY (Pat) on artifact e818e1651dc188f9. Below the 2-vote withhold threshold, but the rung was NOT taken: Pat's single dissent was correct and the lane holds honesty over vote math.
panel_round2.grace: READY — hash/size/825-inventory verified; --as-cran 0/0/1 + CRAN-lane PASS 12011; install-smoke now SMOKE_EXIT=0; UBSAN carry-forward valid (src byte-identical); dev-invert 13476 correctly explained (NOT_CRAN=true mode).
panel_round2.rose: READY — all three round-1 fixes confirmed landed; manifest ceiling not exceeded; 2 minor CONCERNS (stale afd4600a pointer in cran-policy-consult.md; stale mission-control dashboard).
panel_round2.pat: NOT-READY — the round-1 cross-family fix patched only the table cell (cross-family.Rmd:289); two prose passages (:199-203 'fitted values', :292-295 'bring the fitted means back to R') still over-promised the xfam extractors.
panel_round2.resolution: Pat's finding fixed exhaustively in commit 74bdb37c (both prose over-promises removed + honest hedges). Rose's dashboard concern was addressed; her cran-policy-consult.md pointer concern was only PARTIALLY addressed (advanced afd4600a -> e818e165 in commit 74bdb37c, but NOT further advanced to the round-3 artifact 9ca4d07c — a gap the final 6-lens review caught and the consolidation fixes). Re-frozen as 9ca4d07ca403b6c2; round-3 re-run below.

panel_round3.verdict: 3x READY on artifact 9ca4d07ca403b6c2 — but NOT a valid D-43 milestone panel: only Pat was a fresh sub-agent; Grace/Rose were round-2 verdicts plus orchestrator-verified deltas (re-dispatch skipped). A later 6-lens adversarial review showed exactly why the 3-fresh-agent standard exists (see rose entry).
panel_round3.grace: READY — sha256 9ca4d07c + size 6980912 + 825-entry inventory + forbidden-scan-clean + --as-cran 0/0/1(new-submission)+size-INFO + CRAN-lane PASS 12011 + install-smoke pass + UBSAN carry-forward (src byte-identical 091d0a13->74bdb37c) + gate READY-FOR-CLAIMED-RUNG. NOT a fresh round-3 sub-agent (round-2 verdict + orchestrator-verified delta).
panel_round3.rose: READY — NOT a fresh round-3 sub-agent (round-2 verdict + orchestrator-verified delta). **This verdict contained a FALSE claim**: it asserted 'cran-policy-consult.md pointer now 9ca4d07c'. The pointer had only been advanced afd4600a->e818e165 (commit 74bdb37c) and never reached 9ca4d07c. Caught by the final 6-lens review; corrected in the consolidation.
panel_round3.pat: READY (fresh sub-agent) — both cross-family prose over-promises (:199-203, :292-295) removed; vignette internally consistent (NULL-return story throughout; code-checked against R/julia-bridge.R). 3 non-blocking follow-ups (NEWS xfam entry; predict.drmTMB_julia.Rd xfam caveat; README->capability-and-limits link) -> filed as #806.
panel_round3.resolution: A 6-lens adversarial DONE/NOT-DONE review of merged main then found 4 further release-surface/ledger honesty defects (ROADMAP:41-49 4th v0.5.0 instance; this false rose claim + the stale cran-policy pointer; AGENTS.md stale handover pointer; and the frozen candidate 9ca4d07c gone STALE vs main after PR #805 fixed shipped NEWS.md + cross-family.Rmd). All are fixed in the consolidation, which re-freezes from current main and re-runs a proper 3-FRESH-agent panel below.
